description: L15-04 — Registry of transactional email templates. Keys are referenced by name from backend callers (`template_key` column on public.email_outbox). Changes to a template's HTML or subject are deployed by committing a new revision and shipping a migration that bumps the corresponding `template_version` if consumers need to pin. See docs/runbooks/EMAIL_TRANSACTIONAL_RUNBOOK.md §3.

coaching_group_invite.subject: Você foi convidado para {{group_name}}
coaching_group_invite.description: Coaching group invitation (staff → athlete). Triggered from portal-staff assign flow.

championship_invite.subject: {{host_group_name}} convidou sua assessoria para o campeonato {{championship_name}}
championship_invite.description: Championship invite (host assessoria → target assessoria staff).

weekly_training_summary.subject: Resumo semanal — {{group_name}}
weekly_training_summary.description: Weekly Monday 08:00 BRT digest to athletes.

payment_confirmation.subject: Pagamento confirmado — R$ {{amount}}
payment_confirmation.description: Emitted after successful subscription payment, custody deposit, or coin purchase. Explicitly called out in the L15-04 audit risk statement ("seu withdraw foi processado — users didn't get the email").
